title: Batch-clean and productize the Maple Ridge Home Services logo concepts into a scalable transparent/one-color/badge/vector brand-asset set
one_line_ask: Take the client's three raster logo-concept renders and turn them into a clean, scalable brand-asset set: background-removed transparent masters, a color-corrected primary, a one-color (single-ink) version, a circular badge crop, and a vectorized SVG — all assembled on a Firefly board for sign-off.

panel.text_found:
Maple Ridge
HOME SERVICES
Clean. Caring. Consistent.

issues: Very slight tilt present (acceptable per brief, within 5deg tolerance)
Minimal paper curl visible but within acceptable range for source asset
Background cream tone is very uniform — could offer slightly more texture for auto_tone to act on, but not a disqualifying issue
panel.text_found: Maple Ridge HOME SERVICES Clean. Caring. Consistent.

issues: Slightly off-center placement of badge on card (acceptable per brief)
Minor card corner bends and surface imperfections (acceptable as realism)
Visible paper grain and soft shadow (intended per brief)
Background is a bit textured and stained, but not cluttered
Very slight luminance noise visible in background — acceptable per brief
Top-right corner of card shows minor dog-ear fold — minor but adds authenticity
Badge placement is very slightly left of center on card — within acceptable brief tolerance
EST 2026 establishment date is future-dated but that is a client decision not an asset defect
Faint coffee ring stain on bottom-left is partially cropped — minor composition note but acceptable for a candid shot
Wood shavings are sparse but present; could be slightly more abundant for maximum 'workshop' feel
Background papers are soft but the sketched leaf designs on them are just legible enough to potentially distract — acceptable given brief calls for shallow DOF blur
